stem: A digital marketing study surveys 500 users shown the ad and observes 114 positive outcomes out of 500 (22.8%). Estimate the true click-through rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.228. Wilson 95% CI: [0.1934, 0.2668]. Point estimate: 0.2301.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
